description: XLSX/CSV/TXT heavy pack; tests table + sheet + plaintext extraction and Sheet: locations.

expected.verbatim: EDGE-001: Public liability cover of £5,000,000 minimum is required; £10,000,000 preferred for sites with public access.
EDGE-002: All clinical waste must be handled under a registered waste carrier licence (upper tier).
EDGE-003: Monthly management information must be provided in CSV format including task completion rates per site.
EDGE-004: Operatives must sign in via the Authority's QR-code system at each visit — no paper logs are accepted.
Quarterly pricing reviews apply only where CPI exceeds 4% year-on-year.
Town Hall requires daily clean before 07:30 including the council chamber.
Invoices must reference the Authority's purchase order number; unreferenced invoices will be returned unpaid.
